# side

**Instance Property**

The location where the change occurred.

## Declaration

```swift
var side: NSFileProviderTestingOperationSide { get }
```

## Accessing the Operation’s Data

- **itemIdentifier**: The unique identifier for the item that changed.
- **item**: A description of the item that changed.

items.description: The unique identifier for the item that changed.
items.name: itemIdentifier

items.description: A description of the item that changed.
items.name: item
